title: Sleep Anytime
description: Sleep whenever you want in the Overworld. It doesn't matter if it's day or night.
body:
## 🌐 ITITAN Hosting
[![ITITAN Hosting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/3geETR/images/refs/heads/main/Other/ititan.png)](https://ititanhosting.com/game/minecraft)


### SLEEP ANYTIME

Sleep whenever you want in the Overworld. It doesn't matter if it's day or night.

- If you sleep during the day, you'll sleep until morning the next day.
- Only Overworld

**This is a very basic datapack/mod and only work for 1.21.11 and later versions.**
For feedback and datapack/mod requests, discord: **tpcoffline**

![sleep anytime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fb8a8e3752cd3d3909561820f3ee309e85d4fa7.png)
